signals.headline: XRP SEC/CFTC Classify XRP as Digital Commodity (March 2026); CLARITY Act Nears Markup Post-April 13 Senate Return | YES
signals.raw:
XRP SEC/CFTC Classify XRP as Digital Commodity (March 2026); CLARITY Act Nears Markup Post-April 13 Senate Return | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC and CFTC issued a joint release in late March 2026 formally classifying XRP as a "digital commodity" like BTC and ETH, shifting oversight to CFTC spot markets and easing years of regulatory uncertainty for institutional adoption.[2]
